channel.title: Sonic on WithinTrend — Part-Time Job Reviews & Guides

item.title: Working at Sonic Drive-In as a Carhop: Pay, Pros, Cons & What to Expect
item.description: Everything you need to know about working as a carhop at Sonic Drive-In — from tips and hourly pay to daily duties and honest pros and cons.
